message:
🐛 Add multiple Copilot variants to DCO trusted_apps (#116)

Try different possible Copilot username formats:
- Copilot
- Copilot[bot]
- copilot
- copilot-swe-agent

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,9 +28,15 @@ dco:
   kubestellar/kubestellar:
     trusted_apps:
       - Copilot
+      - Copilot[bot]
+      - copilot
+      - copilot-swe-agent
   kubestellar/kubeflex:
     trusted_apps:
       - Copilot
+      - Copilot[bot]
+      - copilot
+      - copilot-swe-agent
 
 # config_updater will automatically update the config configmap when config.yaml changes
 config_updater:
